# Micro-zoning — Lumen — L'Atelier Nord, Fabrique Lumineuse

_Industry bias: tech_startup — warm-minimal atelier palette (light oak + linen + black steel), desks pushed to the daylight façade, generous collab heart, plants embedded in the collab spine rather than scattered at desks (design://client-profiles §1)._

## Executive summary

The atelier parti inverts the usual test-fit logic: 130 developer desks hug the diffuse 40 m north façade as a continuous établi, all enclosed rooms are consolidated in the central 13–27 m band (shielded from daylight but within 7 m of every desk), and the south façade becomes one generous 380 m² café + town-hall social anchor. The one move to protect : keep the central band detailed as a **single acoustic-coherent joinery wall** — oak + glass manifestations + integrated planters — so it reads as a library spine rather than a corridor of doors.

## Zone-by-zone brief

### 1. Developer établi — north façade (y = 33 500 – 39 500, 8 clusters × 16 desks)

- **Role** : 130 focus-grade workstations along 60 m of north light, trame 7 m clear of columns.
- **Furniture** : `millerknoll_jarvis_1524 × 130` (sit-stand, 1524 × 686) + `millerknoll_aeron_b × 130` (task chair, mesh for mixed anthropometry) + `bisley_pedestal_essentials × 130` (mobile ped, 0.75 flex rule allows rotation) + `vitra_kado_locker_400 × 170` cells at the east/west ends.
- **Finishes** : floor = `Interface Composure` carbon-neutral tile, SKOA Grey (design://material-finishes); wall = `Woven Image EchoPanel` 12 mm recycled PET felt, linen tone on the low partition between clusters; ceiling = `Armstrong Ultima+` Class A, αw ≥ 0.90 continuous (levier n°1, design://acoustic-standards §8.1); textile = `Kvadrat Steelcut Trio 3` on chair seat, oatmeal.
- **Acoustic target** : open-plan "good" per NF S 31-199 — D2,S ≥ 7 dB, Lp,A,S,4m ≤ 48 dB, rD ≤ 5 m (design://acoustic-standards §2.3); background HVAC ≤ 42 dB(A) Performant (design://acoustic-standards §1.4).
- **Light** : 500 lux maintained at desk, 4000 K CRI ≥ 80, supplemented by north daylight (EN 12464-1, design://material-finishes §Lighting); `Artemide Tolomeo` task lamp per desk for user control.
- **Biophilic accent** : one mid-height `Dracaena marginata` per 12 desks on the cluster endcaps (y ≈ 33 500 line) — low light tolerant, no stress on screens (design://biophilic-office §2.3). **No desktop plants specified** — atelier sobriety.
- **Sight-lines / adjacencies** : every desk has an unbroken view south across the central spine to the café window-line ~22 m away — prospect distance sits inside the ideal 15–25 m range (design://biophilic-office §11). Phone booths within 15 m of every desk.
- **Notes** : column grid at y=31 500 and y=38 500 is already dodged by the cluster origins; verify no column interferes with the facing-rows gap at x=7 000, 21 000, 35 000, 49 000 [TO VERIFY: check desk 8 of each cluster vs column at same x+500].

### 2. Focus & huddle rooms — central spine west and east (y = 13 500 – 23 000)

- **Role** : 6 focus rooms (1–2 pers) + 8 huddles (4 pers) clustered either side of the lift core.
- **Furniture** : focus rooms — `hm_everywhere_1800 × 6` + `arper_kinesit × 12`; huddles — `hm_everywhere_round_1200 × 8` + `vitra_id_chair_mesh × 32`; 65" wall screen per huddle [TO VERIFY: AV scope in Lumen contract].
- **Finishes** : floor = `Interface Composure` matching open-plan for continuity; wall = `Maars Living Walls Momentum` double-glazed 44 dB Rw partition facing the spine, `Gustafs` micro-perforated oak panel on the rear wall (design://material-finishes); ceiling = `Ecophon Solo` free-hanging islands, NRC 0.95; textile = `Kvadrat Remix 3` on huddle chairs, moss/oat mix.
- **Acoustic target** : DnT,A ≥ 40 dB vs open-plan (Performant, design://acoustic-standards §1.3), TR60 ≤ 0.5 s for huddles ≤ 50 m³ (§1.5), background ≤ 32 dB(A).
- **Light** : 500 lux ambient 3500 K, dimmable to 300 lux for video calls (design://material-finishes §Colour-temperature).
- **Biophilic accent** : one `Sansevieria trifasciata` per focus room on the credenza, visible from seated position (design://biophilic-office §13).
- **Sight-lines / adjacencies** : glazed front + oak back = borrowed light into the spine, visual connection preserved from desks.
- **Notes** : "Salle Médium M5" at corner1 [8000,12500] corner2 [14500,20500] is 52 m² — oversized for 6 pax; reclassify as bookable project/war-room or split [TO VERIFY: intended capacity].

### 3. Medium meeting rooms + boardrooms + war-rooms — central band (y = 24 500 – 30 000)

- **Role** : 4 medium rooms (8 pax), 2 boardrooms (12–14 pax), 2 war-rooms with persistent pinboard walls.
- **Furniture** : medium — `vitra_eames_segmented_2400 × 4` + `arper_kinesit × 32`; boardrooms — `vitra_eames_segmented_4000 × 2` + `millerknoll_embody × 26`; war-rooms — `usm_haller_conference × 2` + `steelcase_roam × 2` mobile stands.
- **Finishes** : floor = `Shaw Contract Inspire` plank in boardrooms for differentiation (design://material-finishes); wall = `BAUX Acoustic Pulp` wood-wool wall, natural tone, in war-rooms (pinboard-compatible); `Kvadrat Soft Cells` in boardrooms; ceiling = `Armstrong Ultima+` in boardrooms, `Ecophon Solo` baffles in war-rooms.
- **Acoustic target** : DnT,A ≥ 45 dB between adjacent meeting rooms (Très performant, design://acoustic-standards §1.3); TR60 ≤ 0.6 s medium, ≤ 0.8 s boardroom ≥ 200 m³ (§1.5); background ≤ 30 dB(A).
- **Light** : 500 lux 3500 K dimmable; `Artemide Tolomeo` hanging above boardroom tables, CRI ≥ 90 for client-facing (design://material-finishes).
- **Biophilic accent** : one mid-height `Schefflera arboricola` at each boardroom entrance; war-rooms plant-free (walls needed for output).
- **Sight-lines / adjacencies** : boardrooms at east/west ends of the spine = clearer client choreography (walk from reception along spine, no traversal of dev zone).
- **Notes** : continuous acoustic ceiling must bridge over the partitions at ceiling plenum to hit DnT,A — specify a full-height acoustic insert above T-grid.

### 4. Phone booth bank — central spine (y = 12 500, 14 units)

- **Role** : 14 × 1-pax booths, 7/100 FTE target hit exactly (design://collaboration-spaces §1).
- **Furniture** : `framery_one_compact × 14` (1030 × 1000, acoustic reduction ~30 dB).
- **Finishes** : interior is manufacturer-supplied; floor around = `Bolon Artisan Nature` woven vinyl for spill tolerance in spine (design://material-finishes).
- **Acoustic target** : booth interior ≤ 30 dB(A) background, STI ≤ 0.2 externally at 1 m (design://acoustic-standards §7); commission in situ post-install — claimed 30 dB often drops to 15 dB with poor door seals.
- **Light** : internal 3500 K 500 lux integrated.
- **Biophilic accent** : a single 6 m linear `Epipremnum aureum` trailing planter above the booth line (y = 12 500), delivering a continuous green "eyebrow" across the spine (design://biophilic-office §1.3).
- **Sight-lines / adjacencies** : two gaps kept at x=26 000–33 000 (lift/stair) and at cluster-ends for the north-south secondary circulation spines.
- **Notes** : ventilation duct heat rejection — confirm plenum capacity for 14 booths [TO VERIFY: HVAC return above y=12 500].

### 5. Café + lounge tampon + town hall — south façade (y = 500 – 11 500, 60 m × 11 m)

- **Role** : 380 m² social heart, café (west, 260 m²) + lounge tampon (centre, 60 m²) + town hall (east, 180 m²) with mobile partition for 440 m² event mode.
- **Furniture** : café — 12 × bar benches + `magis_jam × 40` + `hay_mags_soft_3s × 6` booths against the spine wall + `vitra_alcove_2264 × 4` for acoustic pockets; town hall — `vitra_tip_ton × 80` stackable + `steelcase_roam × 2` + retractable screen; lounge tampon — `muuto_outline_sofa_3s × 2` + `pedrali_babila_lounge × 6` + `haworth_buzzinest × 2`.
- **Finishes** : floor = `Lithurin` polished concrete in café (tech-startup appropriate, design://material-finishes), `Interface Composure` carpet in lounge tampon for TR60 break; wall = `Clayworks` clay plaster feature wall south façade with oak `Gustafs` panels either side; ceiling = `Ecophon Solo` islands at 3 heights forming an irregular canopy (fractal D ≈ 1.4 target, design://biophilic-office §9); textile = `Kvadrat Remix 3` on soft seating.
- **Acoustic target** : continuous Class A ceiling αw ≥ 0.90, TR60 ≤ 0.6 s even in 440 m² event mode (design://acoustic-standards §10); sound masking at ~45 dB(A) during work hours, off during events (§6.3).
- **Light** : 3000 K 300 lux ambient in café + accent `Bocci 28` cluster over bar, 3500 K 500 lux in town hall mode; BSO on south façade for solar control.
- **Biophilic accent** : mature `Ficus lyrata` (2.5 m) + `Monstera deliciosa` in large planters at café/tampon transition; seasonal `Strelitzia nicolai` for events (on wheels, self-watering). Target density 5% here compensates for the restraint at desks — overall plate lands at 3–4% moderate tier (design://biophilic-office §1.1).
- **Sight-lines / adjacencies** : prospect sight-line from every desk through the spine to the south windows 28 m away, refuge pockets delivered by the Alcove booths (design://biophilic-office §11).
- **Notes** : > 300 m² continuous when mobile partition is open → **désenfumage obligatoire** + second evac route confirmed on east end [TO VERIFY: ERP Type W classification with local bureau de contrôle].

### 6. Circulation spine — east-west at y = 28 000 and secondary spines

- **Role** : primary 1.80 m clear link from reception (west) to sanitaires (east), secondaries at x = 14 000 / 28 000 / 42 000 at 1.40 m.
- **Finishes** : floor = `Bolon Artisan Nature` runner through the spine as visual wayfinding thread, contrasting with carpet in zones; ceiling = continuous `Armstrong Ultima+`.
- **Light** : 200 lux 3500 K wayfinding level; accent spots at decision points (reception, lifts, WCs).
- **Biophilic accent** : the continuous trailing planter at y = 12 500 (see §4) doubles as a "green eyebrow" for wayfinding.
- **Notes** : PMR compliant throughout; verify both east and west end-of-spine fire exits are ≥ 0.90 m clear [TO VERIFY: door schedule].

## Programming hot spots

- **Protect the 1.80 m primary circulation at y = 28 000** — do not let medium meeting rooms creep north or collab furniture creep south of this line; it is the plate's backbone.
- **Specify the central band as a single joinery package** (oak + glazed doors + integrated LED + planter) so 24 rooms read as one library wall, not a hospital corridor.
- **Commission phone booths in situ** before sign-off — seal and ventilation are where the 30 dB claim collapses (design://acoustic-standards §7).
- **Budget a single post-occupancy acoustic campaign at M+3** measuring D2,S and rD on the plate per ISO 3382-3, and hold a remediation envelope in the AEI contract.
- **Biophilic maintenance contract is non-negotiable** — 5–10% replacement stock held at nursery, weekly watering, quarterly light survey (design://biophilic-office §4.2).
- **Desks 1–2 of the outermost clusters (x=1 500 and x=54 500)** lose some daylight from façade returns — verify lux survey in winter noon conditions [TO VERIFY].
